name: Swashbuckler
official_rules_text: When a unit with the Swashbuckler keyword spends 1 or more Aim tokens during an Attack action, after the effect is resolved, it gains 1 Dodge token.
description: When a unit with the Swashbuckler keyword spends 1 or more Aim tokens during an Attack action, after the effect is resolved, it gains 1 Dodge token.
